description: idealo is a price comparison service that helps users compare products and offers from online retailers. The idealo.tools domain appears to host tooling related to that service, including an MCP endpoint for AI assistants.
summary: idealo.tools exposes a public MCP server at https://idealo-app-in-chatgpt.idealo.tools/v5/mcp/ with no authentication discovered; no public HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found for this domain.
